---
title: "list_models.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/list_models.py"
loc: 21
complexity: 4
logic_score: 6.65
style_score: 3.97
intel_score: 9.02
overall_score: 6.60
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating ModelLister, execute.

## Interaction Protocol
Import ModelLister and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.7/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 7 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [os](file://os)
- [dotenv](file://dotenv)
- [google](file://google)

### Exports
- `ModelLister`
- `execute`
